name: elon-musk
description: Elon Musk method skills for strategy, engineering, teams, risk, execution, memory, and handoff.

interface.shortDescription: x-prefixed skills for strategy, engineering, teams, risk, memory, and handoff.
interface.longDescription: A compact skill plugin with 17 searchable x-prefixed skills. Use it to route messy problems, question requirements, simplify plans, review teams and organizations, inspect risk, turn ambitious missions into staged execution, save reusable lessons, and write continuation handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use $x-compound to save the reusable lesson from this review.
